Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Text Ruling

Brian T. Dunn, Esq. of THE COCHRAN FIRM (323-931-6200), appearing for plaintiffs via courtcall

RULING:
The motion for withdrawal of attorney of record by plaintiffs' lawyers. No appearance by plaintiffs GWENDOLYN RANCHER, MARVIN RANCHER, HARLAND RANCHER, and tentative ruling adopted: Counsel's motion for withdrawal as attorney of record is granted. No opposition filed.
